name: desktop-pet-electron
description: A local Electron desktop pet that plays DesktopPet PetPack assets.

scripts.check: node --check electron/main.js && node --check electron/preload.js && node --check electron/petpack.js && node --check electron/store.js && node --check electron/constants.js && node --check electron/renderer/renderer.js && node --check electron/settings/settings.js && node --check scripts/validate_petpack.mjs && node --check scripts/analyze_petpack_assets.mjs && node --check scripts/generate_yuanbao_petpack_v2.mjs
scripts.validate: node scripts/validate_petpack.mjs Yuanbao.petpack && node scripts/validate_petpack.mjs Resources/DefaultPetPack
